hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/ios/.*\.swift$' || exit 0; cd /Users/ashoktejagadepalli/Work/formula-helper/ios && xcodegen generate 2>&1 | tail -2 && xcodebuild -project FormulaHelper.xcodeproj -scheme FormulaHelper -destination 'id=7C6C84EE-AB35-4BA9-ACA3-388E9A2FD54E' -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | grep -E 'error:|BUILD SUCCEEDED|BUILD FAILED'; APP_PATH=$(find ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData -name 'FormulaHelper.app' -path '*/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/*' 2>/dev/null | grep -v Index.noindex | head -1); [ -n "$APP_PATH" ] && xcrun simctl install 7C6C84EE-AB35-4BA9-ACA3-388E9A2FD54E "$APP_PATH" && xcrun simctl launch 7C6C84EE-AB35-4BA9-ACA3-388E9A2FD54E com.ashokteja.formulahelper 2>/dev/null; true
